data.title: Accelerant Announces Date of Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
data.description: A business report from Atlanta announces that Accelerant has scheduled the release of its financial results for the second quarter of 2026. The company will be hosting a conference call to discuss these results on that date.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pounded As Oil Surges; Metals Firm Hits New Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: The price of oil exceeded $92 per barrel, while Micron and companies producing chip gear experienced a rally. The Nasdaq faced significant losses due to the surge in oil prices. Additionally, a metals firm recorded a new high entry. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Brown-Forman Stockholders Elect Directors
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky today, Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE: BFA, BFB) held its annual stockholders meeting. The slate of directors recommended by the Board of Directors for the 2026 term was elected by the stockholders. Additionally, the compensation of the named executive officers was approved on a non-binding advisory basis. Ernst & Young LLP was ratified as the independent registered public accounting firm for Brown-Forman.

data.title: Omega Announces Increase in Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Hunt Valley, Maryland, Omega Healthcare Investors, Inc. (NYSE: OHI) has declared a cash dividend of $0.68 per share. This marks an increase of $0.01 per share from the previous quarter, payable on August 14, 2026. The dividend will go to common stockholders recorded by the close of business on August 3, 2026. Taylor Pickett, Omega’s CEO, expressed satisfaction with the announcement.

data.title: KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Results on August 13, 2026
data.description: Lake Oswego, Oregon - KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc. is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2026 on August 13, 2026. This announcement will provide important insights into the company's performance, including its revenue, profits, and overall financial health during this period. Investors and stakeholders will be eagerly awaiting this report to assess the company's progress and future prospects. The disclosure is expected to shed light on critical figures such as revenue generated, expenses incurred, and any notable developments that could impact KinderCare Learning Companies, Inc.'s market position.

data.title: BeFra Announces US$0.36 Per Share Quarterly Dividend Payable on August 20, 2026
data.description: Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE: BWMX) known as BeFra, declared a total dividend of MX $250,000,000 during its recent shareholders meeting on July 20, 2026. This equals around US$ 0.3613 per share pre-tax withholdings, or US $0.3252 per share post-tax. Shareholders of record will receive this dividend on August 20, 2026.

data.title: BeFra Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX), known as BeFra, released its Q2 2026 financial results. All figures are in nominal Mexican Pesos (Ps.), approved by the Board of Directors, and follow IFRS standards. The report, with minor rounding differences, was presented by the President and CEO, highlighting the second quarter's performance.
Reynolds Consumer Products announces their usual quarterly cash dividend payout.

data.title: Grove to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6, 2026
data.description: In San Francisco, Grove Collaborative Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: GROV) declared that they are set to disclose their second-quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market closure on August 6, 2026. Grove is identified as the pioneer plastic-neutral retailer globally, and a top sustainable consumer goods entity, holding titles as a Certified B Corporation and Public Benefit Corporation. The review of these financial results will be conducted through an investor conference call and webcast at 5:00pm ET / 2:00pm PT.

data.title: Comfort Systems USA Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Houston-based Comfort Systems USA, Inc. (NYSE: FIX) announced their quarterly results for the period ending June 30, 2026. In this quarter, the company reported a net income of $441.6 million, translating to $12.53 per diluted share. This is a notable increase from the $230.8 million, or $6.53 per diluted share, reported in the same quarter of 2025. Revenue for the second quarter of 2026 rose to $3.27 billion, up from $2.17 billion in 2025. Additionally, the company disclosed an operating cash flow of $1.14 billion for the current quarter.

GE HEALTHCARE POSTED PRELIMINARY Q2 REVENUE OF $5.30 BLN VERSUS $5.26 BLN EXPECTED, SEES ADJUSTED EPS Y/Y GROWTH ABOVE EXPECTATIONS, REAFFIRMED THE GUIDANCE GIVEN ON APRIL 29, 2026, AND SAID CFO JAMES SACCARO WILL STEP DOWN.

data.title: Assurant Appoints Kelli Ertel as Chief Communications Officer and Chief of Staff
data.description: Assurant, Inc., a multinational corporation known for protecting and servicing connected devices, homes, vehicles, and commercial equipment, has named Kelli Ertel as the new Chief Communications Officer and Chief of Staff. Ertel's appointment to this dual role, effective immediately, involves joining Assurant's Management Committee. She will be responsible for overseeing the company's communication strategies. Assurant, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AIZ, collaborates with renowned global brands for its operations.

data.title: World Kinect Corporation Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Miami, World Kinect Corporation (NYSE: WKC) released its financial results for the second quarter of 2026. Key figures include a gross profit of $365 million and an adjusted gross profit of $350 million. The company reported a GAAP net income of $48 million, equivalent to $0.94 per diluted share, while their adjusted net income was $66 million, or $1.29 per diluted share. Additionally, the adjusted EBITDA stood at $136 million. World Kinect Corporation also repurchased $14 million of common stock and boosted its regular quarterly cash dividend by 15% during this period.

data.title: EnerSys Refines Plans for Defense‑Focused Lithium Cell Manufacturing Facility with DOE Support
data.description: EnerSys, a leading global company in stored energy solutions, announced updates on its forthcoming U.S.-based lithium cell manufacturing plant in Greenville, South Carolina. The facility, slated to be operational soon, will primarily concentrate on producing lithium cells tailored for aerospace, defense, and specialized industrial uses necessitating a reliable U.S. supply chain. This refined strategy aligns with EnerSys' commitment to catering to specific sectors. The company's NYSE ticker symbol is ENS.

data.title: TIC Solutions Confirms Date for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release
data.description: TIC Solutions, Inc., a prominent firm offering tech-enabled asset integrity, engineering, and geospatial services, revealed plans to disclose its second-quarter 2026 financial outcomes prior to market opening on August 6, 2026. The company, trading on NYSE as TIC, will conduct a webcast and conference call at 8:30 a.m. (Eastern Time) to elaborate on the numbers.

data.title: Expro Completes Acquisition of Enhanced Drilling
data.description: In a recent announcement, Expro Ltd (NYSE: XPRO) revealed the completion of the acquisition of Enhanced Well Technologies Group AS (“Enhanced Drilling”). The transaction involved Expro buying Enhanced Drilling for around 2 billion Norwegian kroner (NOK), equivalent to approximately $215 million in cash, along with customary closing adjustments and working capital. This acquisition has positioned Expro as a prominent supplier of advanced drilling technologies, marking a significant development for the company.

data.title: A 900-Page Medical Record Hid a Six-Figure Detail. An AI Tool Caught It in Seconds.
data.description: In Mineola, New York, a significant finding was made by Anthony A. Ciaccio from Schalk, Ciaccio & Khan regarding a client's medical file. Among its 900 pages, it was discovered that a client's previous back surgery and latest injury were on opposite sides of the spine. This detail, uncovered by the AI legal assistant Companion™ by EvenUp, could have been easily missed but potentially impactful for the case. The insurer could have used this information to dispute the new injury claim. Companion™ played a crucial role in identifying this crucial distinction, providing Ciaccio with a new strategic angle for the case.

data.title: Energy Transfer LP Announces Cash Distribution on Series I Preferred Units
data.description: Energy Transfer LP (ET) has declared a cash distribution of $0.2111 per Series I Preferred Unit (NYSE: ETprI). This distribution will be paid on August 14, 2026, to Series I unitholders of record as of August 4, 2026. Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) manages a vast energy asset portfolio in the U.S., boasting roughly 140,000 pipeline miles.

data.title: Five Point Holdings, LLC Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Irvine, California, Five Point Holdings, LLC, a company specializing in large mixed-use planned communities in California, announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2026. The President and CEO, Dan Hedigan, expressed satisfaction with Five Point's performance, revealing a consolidated net income of $29.9 million for the quarter. The company closed the quarter with robust total liquidity amounting to $565.9 million, which included $348.4 million in cash and equivalents.

data.title: The NRP Group Breaks Ground on 88-Unit Affordable Housing Development, Alora Lofts, Near Orlando, Florida
data.description: In Kissimmee, Florida, The NRP Group has secured funding and started construction on Alora Lofts, an affordable housing project consisting of 88 units. Situated 18 miles south of Orlando, the development aims to offer quality housing options for individuals and families falling within the 30% to 70% bracket of the Area Median Income (AMI). This initiative is a significant move towards addressing the housing needs of low to moderate-income households in the region.
